title: T-041 — Reference.D365_Constants table + Apex seed (NPD-d)
prompt:
# T-041 — Reference.D365_Constants schema + Apex seed

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §10.4
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Reference.D365_Constants table per §10.4 and seed the 12 Apex constants.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0050 emits Reference.D365_Constants(constant_key PK, tenant_id, constant_value, description, marker, last_updated, schema_version, RLS). Seed file with 12 entries (PRODUCTIONSITEID=FNOR, APPROVERPERSONNELNUMBER=APX100048, etc. per §10.4 table).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0050_d365_constants.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/d365-constants.ts [create]
- packages/db/seeds/d365-constants-apex.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/d365-constants.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0050 ran and seed executed, when SELECT count(*) FROM "Reference.D365_Constants" WHERE tenant_id=apex, then count=12
2. Given SELECT WHERE constant_key='PRODUCTIONSITEID', then constant_value='FNOR'
3. Given seed re-runs, when called twice, then count remains 12 and content unchanged

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for count, key value, idempotency
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed:d365-constants-apex && pnpm --filter db test d365-constants'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not seed without tenant_id
- Do not commit PRODUCTGROUPID_PR placeholder TBD value (mark NULL until configured)

pipeline_inputs.description: Reference.D365_Constants table + 12 Apex seed values per §10.4 table.
pipeline_inputs.details: DDL with composite PK on (tenant_id, constant_key) + RLS. Seed uses PRD-listed 12 entries idempotently.
